name: blackraptor-bridge
description: Cross-cutting agents shared by the development team and the executive council: `product-manager` (the end-to-end product owner bridging market demand and the build) and `evidence-auditor` (the adversarial gate for research, analysis, and evidence-based reporting), plus the `research-integrity` methodology skill. Auto-installed as a dependency of either team plugin — you don't install it directly.
